title: NEXUS Guardian Integration Profile v0.3
description: Wire format for the NEXUS-ACS Bridge Specification v0.1. Extends AOS (Agent Operating Standard) JSON-RPC 2.0 with NEXUS DID identity, cryptographic provenance, and AISM invariant context. Defined in NEXUS-A2A Specification v0.3 Part III.

jsonrpc.description: JSON-RPC protocol version. Always 2.0 per AOS specification.

method.description: AOS step method. nexus/* methods are NEXUS-A2A extensions not present in base AOS.

id.description: JSON-RPC request ID. Used to correlate Guardian response to original request.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this Guardian evaluation step.

action.description: The action being evaluated. Required for toolCallRequest and toolCallResult.

memory.description: Memory operation context. Required for memoryStore and memoryContextRetrieval.

reasoning.description: Agent's reasoning chain that produced this action. Hash is included in NOR fingerprint when present.

reasoning_hash.description: SHA-256 of the reasoning field. Computed by the SDK. Enables non-repudiation of reasoning chains.

nexus_extension.description: NEXUS-specific context. ACS-only Guardians SHOULD ignore unknown fields in this block.

NEXUSAgentContext.description: NEXUS agent identity. The id field satisfies ACS string compatibility; did, spiffe_id, and act_tier are NEXUS extensions.

id.description: ACS-compatible string agent ID. Set to agent_did for NEXUS agents.

did.description: Decentralized Identifier (DID) of the agent. Cryptographically bound to AIM.

spiffe_id.description: SPIFFE SVID for workload attestation. Provides process-level cryptographic binding.

act_tier.description: ACT Capability Tier (1=supervised, 2=conditionally autonomous, 3=autonomous-bounded, 4=autonomous-unbounded). ACT-3/4 triggers HEAR Doctrine requirements.

aim_digest.description: SHA-256 of the agent's current AIM. Enables Guardian to verify capability manifest integrity.

granted_scopes.description: VCC-granted capability scopes for this agent. Used for I-2 monotonic scope enforcement.

method.description: Name of the tool or function being called.

arguments.description: Tool call arguments as key-value pairs. Inspected by Guardian for path traversal, IMDS access, and credential exfiltration patterns.

arguments_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON of arguments. Included in NOR fingerprint.

server_url.description: MCP server URL when method routes through protocols/mcp.

content.description: Memory content being written or retrieved.

zone.description: Memory zone classification. SESSION writes exempt from provenance requirement per I-3.

provenance.description: Cryptographic provenance. Required for all non-SESSION zones per I-3.

drift_score.description: Cosine distance from agent's established belief embedding. Scores above 0.3 blocked by Memory Vaccine; Guardian threshold is 0.25.

source_did.description: DID of the agent that wrote this memory.

embedding_hash.description: SHA-256 of the embedding vector at write time. Enables drift detection at retrieval.

checkpoint_id.description: ID of the 24-hour signed checkpoint this write belongs to.

NEXUSExtension.description: NEXUS-specific fields in the nexus: namespace. ACS Guardians that do not implement NEXUS SHOULD ignore unknown properties.

cael_envelope_hash.description: SHA-256 of the authorizing CAEL envelope.

parent_scopes.description: Scopes inherited from the delegation parent. Used for I-2 scope attenuation verification.

aism_violations.description: AISM invariant violations detected by the NEXUS layer before forwarding to Guardian.

joulework_balance.description: Current JouleWork economic account balance. Guardian can deny actions when balance approaches zero.

GuardianVerdict.description: Guardian response to a StepContext evaluation request.

decision.description: Guardian verdict. deny must include deny_reason. modify must include modified_request.

step_id.description: Echo of the request step_id for correlation.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable reason codes. NEXUS prefixes: NEXUS_I1 through NEXUS_I6 for invariant violations.

modified_request.description: Replacement action when decision=modify. Schema matches ActionContext.

nor_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint used to generate the NOR for this verdict.

policy_id.description: ID of the policy rule that produced the verdict.
